target.rawSql:
SELECT
  'Weekend Market Closed' AS text,
  (date_trunc('week', now() at time zone 'utc') + interval '4 days 22 hours') AS time,
  (date_trunc('week', now() at time zone 'utc') + interval '6 days 22 hours') AS "timeEnd";

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    run_ts_utc as time,
    status,
    total,
    pass,
    warn,
    error,
    fail,
    skipped
FROM monitoring.dbt_test_runs
ORDER BY run_ts_utc DESC
LIMIT 50;

select
  date_trunc('minute', now() - interval '24 hours') as start_time,
  count(*) as dlq_events_24h
from monitoring.dead_letter_events
where kafka_offset is not null
  and now() - interval '24 hours' <= now();

SELECT COALESCE(total_lag, 0) AS v
FROM monitoring.kafka_lag_latest
WHERE group_id = 'spark_stream_raw_prices'
  AND topic = 'commodity_prices';

SELECT
  to_char(ts_utc, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "Time",
  error_reason AS "Error",
  left(raw_payload, 40) AS "Payload"
FROM monitoring.dead_letter_events
ORDER BY ts_utc DESC
LIMIT 20;

select
  error_reason,
  count(*) as n
from monitoring.dead_letter_events
group by error_reason
order by n desc;

select
  run_ts_utc as time,
  total
from monitoring.dbt_test_runs
order by run_ts_utc desc
limit 1;

SELECT
  to_char(ts_utc, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "Time",
  error_reason AS "Error",
  left(raw_payload, 60) AS "Payload"
FROM monitoring.dead_letter_events
ORDER BY ts_utc DESC
LIMIT 1;

select
  error_reason,
  kafka_partition,
  kafka_offset
from monitoring.dead_letter_events
order by kafka_offset desc
limit 1;

select
  date_trunc('minute', now()) as ts,
  count(*) as errors
from monitoring.dead_letter_events
group by ts
order by ts;

select
  run_ts_utc as time,
  (error + fail) as failures
from monitoring.dbt_test_runs
order by run_ts_utc;

select run_ts_utc, status
from monitoring.dbt_test_runs
order by run_ts_utc desc
limit 5;

SELECT
COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - max(backup_ts))),999999) AS seconds_since_backup
FROM monitoring.backup_log
WHERE status = 'OK';

select
  case
    when now() - max(event_ts) < interval '7 minutes' then 2
    when now() - max(event_ts) < interval '15 minutes' then 1
    else 0
  end as pipeline_status_code
from public.raw_prices;

select
  case
    when count(*) = 0 then 'OK'
    else 'ERROR'
  end as pipeline_status
from monitoring.dead_letter_events
where now() - interval '10 minutes' <= now();

SELECT
  'As of ' ||
  to_char(event_ts, 'HH24:MI') ||
  ' UTC ' ||
  to_char(event_ts, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS last_update
FROM public.raw_prices
WHERE commodity = 'bitcoin'
ORDER BY event_ts DESC, event_id DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  '$' || to_char(price, 'FM999,999,999,990.00') AS price
FROM public.raw_prices
WHERE commodity = 'gold'
ORDER BY event_ts DESC, event_id DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH current_utc AS (
  SELECT now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS utc_ts
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN (
      (extract(dow FROM utc_ts) = 5 AND utc_ts::time >= TIME '22:00')
      OR extract(dow FROM utc_ts) = 6
      OR (extract(dow FROM utc_ts) = 0 AND utc_ts::time < TIME '22:00')
    )
    THEN '● CLOSED'
    ELSE '● OPEN'
  END AS market_utc_status
FROM current_utc;

SELECT
  '$' || to_char(price, 'FM999,999,999,990.00') AS price
FROM public.raw_prices
WHERE commodity = 'bitcoin'
ORDER BY event_ts DESC, event_id DESC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT '● OPEN' AS market_status;

SELECT
  '$' || to_char(price, 'FM999,999,999,990.0000') AS price
FROM public.raw_prices
WHERE commodity = 'eurusd'
ORDER BY event_ts DESC, event_id DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN (
      (extract(dow from now() at time zone 'utc') = 5 AND (now() at time zone 'utc')::time >= time '22:00')
      OR extract(dow from now() at time zone 'utc') = 6
      OR (extract(dow from now() at time zone 'utc') = 0 AND (now() at time zone 'utc')::time < time '22:00')
    )
    THEN '● CLOSED'
    ELSE '● OPEN'
  END AS market_status;

SELECT
  minute_bucket AS "time",
  (array_agg(price ORDER BY event_ts DESC, event_id DESC))[1] AS last_price
FROM (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', event_ts) AS minute_bucket,
    event_ts,
    event_id,
    price
  FROM public.raw_prices
  WHERE commodity = 'gold'
    AND $__timeFilter(event_ts)
) s
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  minute_bucket AS "time",
  (array_agg(price ORDER BY event_ts DESC, event_id DESC))[1] AS last_price
FROM (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', event_ts) AS minute_bucket,
    event_ts,
    event_id,
    price
  FROM public.raw_prices
  WHERE commodity = 'bitcoin'
    AND $__timeFilter(event_ts)
) s
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  minute_bucket AS "time",
  last_price AS value
FROM analytics.mart_minute_last_price
WHERE symbol = 'EUR/USD'
  AND $__timeFilter(minute_bucket)
ORDER BY 1;

options.content: PIPELINE HEALTH

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(events_last_6m, 0)
FROM monitoring.pipeline_metrics;

SELECT
  COALESCE(
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ingest_ts - event_ts)),
    0
  ) AS last_event_processing_lag_seconds
FROM public.raw_prices
ORDER BY ingest_ts DESC
LIMIT 1;

options.content: API METRICS (1h)

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'API Metrics (1h)' AS section;

SELECT
  COUNT(*)
FROM monitoring.api_calls
WHERE ts_utc >= now() - interval '60 minutes';

SELECT
  COUNT(*)
FROM monitoring.api_calls
WHERE ts_utc >= now() - interval '60 minutes'
  AND NOT ok;

SELECT
  COALESCE(
    percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms),
    0
  )
FROM monitoring.api_calls
WHERE ts_utc >= now() - interval '60 minutes'
  AND ok
  AND latency_ms IS NOT NULL;

SELECT
  COALESCE(
    ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN ok THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 0),
    0
  )
FROM monitoring.api_calls
WHERE ts_utc >= now() - interval '60 minutes';
